### Missing Trac Ticket

This PR does not include a valid Trac ticket reference. All PRs that modify files outside of the `docs/` directory must be linked to an open, accepted Trac ticket.

**What to do:**

1. Visit https://code.djangoproject.com/ and find or file the appropriate ticket for your change.
2. Wait for the ticket to be triaged and accepted before submitting a PR. Patches submitted against unreviewed tickets are unlikely to be merged.
3. Edit the **Trac ticket number** section of your PR description to include the ticket in the format `ticket-NNNNN` (e.g. `ticket-36991`).

If your PR only changes files inside the `docs/` folder, no ticket is required.

For more information see the [Django contribution guidelines](https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/dev/internals/contributing/writing-code/submitting-patches/).
